title: Great for thick hair.
text: This is a really great comb for getting through thick or tangled hair.  While it is not suitable for fine or thin hair, it is great for my daughter’s thick, wavy hair.  It is a pleasant, light mauve color and sturdy as well.  Can be used on wet or dry hair.  Compared to a typical comb of this style, the teeth are much larger and spaced further apart.  The only downsides are that the length is 1 1/2 inches longer than a regular comb making it more difficult to transport in a makeup bag, and the price is double or more.  Recommended for long, thick, or curly hair.

title: Light serum/moisturizer combo.  Safe/natural.
text: This serum from a Korean skincare company is a good balance between a serum and a moisturizer.  It is light, but moisturizing as it contains 6 types of hyaluronic acid.  This company uses safe and natural ingredients and avoids the top 20 questionable skin care ingredients.  It tones and firms the skin with hibiscus extract  It has a very faint natural hibiscus scent.  Comes in a tall glass bottle with a pump.  My skin feels soft and my wrinkles are diminished since using this product.  Highly recommend.

title: Helps skin’s pH and moisture level.
text:
I have tried a few products by this company that I didn’t cere for because of the synthetic fragrance added to their sensitive skin products. This one is the first that did not say it was for sensitive skin, but also has no added fragrance. There is a light scent due to the regular ingredients.

I like that this mask helps replenish the skin’s normal pH level and has good, quality ingredients for moisturizing the skin. Comes with 10 sheet masks you wear for 15-20 minutes and is similar to other Korean sheet masks. What I don’t like is that the mask is extra wide and covers a lot of my hair area. It also bags more than other masks around the nose area, so I have to keep pushing it down. Overall, it is a gentle mask that provides good moisture to the skin in the specified time.

title: Low maintenance hat/wig combo
text: I absolutely love the concept of this wig and it really is a put on and go piece. The only reason that I didn't rate it 5 stars is the fact that my head is small so the hat doesn't fit like it would on an average size head. The hair is pretty with adequate density. Shedding was minimal and this is perfect to go run errands or meet friends without spending any time on your hair.

title: Nice beginners friendly closure
text: This closure arrives soft straight out the packaging. The hair has no strong chemical smell and the shedding was minimal. The closure is HD on the skin as well as free parting. It's a true 4x4 measurement. It's a decent closure for the price.

title: 4 clips in 1...
text: I thought these clips were pretty at first glance, but once I got them in hand I discovered that it's just one long clip on the bottom with three smaller clips on top. It really is a unique design. I'll likely just use the clip on the bottom but I would love to see someone style their hair using all four clips at the same time.

title: Nice set but not very effective for me
text: Overall it’s a fun tool set. Good quality and nicely packaged. I like the idea of curling my hair without damaging it. To be honest I was more excited about the process than the result. I have long thick hair. It doesn’t curl much and whatever curls do materialize, they don’t last long.

title: Large assortment
text: Large assortment of hair accessories for kids. They look stylish and complement each other. Good quality and it says hand made on many of them. They look great with various outfits.

title: Large and bright rhinestones
text: Cute, bright headband. Decent quality product that fits well on my head. It has soft lining inside. The rhinestones are rather large and bright, addicting an element of fun to the attire.

title: Strong silage
text: This perfume has a rather overwhelming scent to it. After the perfume warms up, you could clearly smell the scent that resembles tobacco. It also has hints of blueberry and rosemary. The silage is heavy and strong. I think this kind of a heavy scent is better suited for evenings. I do like the packaging. It looks classy and very elegant.

title: Good value set
text: I have a good impression of this set. The brush feels pleasant my on head. I like the feel of natural wood in my hand. Works excellent as a brush as it’s bristles are made of wood and don’t scratch my scalp. It feels as if I’m getting a massage. Comb works well also, especially with wet hair. Sometimes I have problems with knotty hair after a wash but the comb helps yo comb the knots out. Good value set.

title: Good texture and light scents
text: This is one of my favorite cosmetics brands. I’ve been looking for portable sized bottles for a while. I love their scents and that they are based on grape ingredients. The set includes some of my favorites. One of them is the foaming cleanser that actually has lightweight and airy foam texture and Vinosource sorbet that has a great moisturizing effect on my skin and makes it look fresh. All of them have light scents that I like and and works gentle with my facial skin. This set is great if you would like to try a few things at once without spending extra money on the full bottles. I would also say that their size is perfect for traveling and it has nice packaging that might work as a gift.

title: Works well for long hair
text: The hand curling wand works well. I have long hair and it allows me to curl the full length of the hair. It heats quickly and to high temperature. Curled hair hold their form for a while.

title: Great for beginners!
text:
By no means I'm a make up artist or a professional. I do like experimenting with my make up and when I saw this set I saw the perfect opportunity to do so. It was super easy to use and I believe is beginner friendly.
I found that sliding the liner slowly is better to get the best coverage and let it dry before you close your eyes to avoid transfer is great. If you have a little dan that would be ideal.
I can't wait to try to do a cut crease and just playing with all the colors. So many colors in one set!

title: Night Gel moisturizer
text:
I like how convenient the packaging is. Extremely good to have a pump instead of a jar to avoid cross contamination. The packaging is very comparable to any high end moisturizer. It actually looks better than the regular ones sold in pharmacies. I have combination/sensitive skin and at times I get dry patches so I do need that extra hydration that I didn't not get from this moisturizer. I think this is very good for someone with normal, combination or oily skin.

The scent is a little strong. It's probably the tea tree oil in it but it goes away fast and it kind of gives you that refreshing feeling. It's a very light moisturizer.

title: Wow just wow!
text:
I'm so excited about writing this review! I posted a before and after of my forehead and the difference is incredibly noticeable.

I have combination/sensitive skin with large pores. I typically use loose powder and it gets messy.
What caught my attention on this product was not only what it claims to do but how much easier and convenient it looks.
It comes with a little puff but I personally use a brush and I didn't use a lot of product. Just a little swipe and that was enough, most of my pores were blurred. The little mirror that comes with it is super convenient. I no longer have to carry the loose powder and a mirror separately.

The packaging itself it's very comparable to any high end brand. I'm supper happy with the results. I haven't even had to retouch my face at all at work and I can confidently say goodbye to some of my big pores lol

title: Great for reusable masks
text: These brackets have worked well during the pandemic. I am able to wear them under my washable face masks with no issues. I am able to breathe and talk freely

title: Good set of bundles
text: These bundles are really nice. I did not have alot of shedding or tangles. I was able to style and curle the bundles with ease. The length is true to the inch and no smell.

title: No Bald Spots
text: This mannequin head is great. The hair texture is not dry and there was no bald spots. I was able to do box braids and wash the hair without any issues.

title: Nice and Classy Headbands
text: I just love these headbands. They are velvety soft and do not slide off your head. The pearls allow you to dress them up or down.

title: Good Brushes
text: These detangling brushes work good. Be sure to finger detangle your hair prior to using. Also have good conditioner on the hair helps with tugging

title: Good Quality
text: These butterfly locs are nice. They are lightweight and made well. The color of them can be a little darker due to the shine on the hair

title: Barbie Doll Hair
text: The hair is made like barbie doll hair. It was very shiny with a residue on the hair. Considering that it is synthetic, I was not able to shampoo the hair for better results

title: Nice Bug Color
text: The bug color is great for the fall. The hair was lightweight and easy to install. The length was as described with no residue or odor on the hair.

title: Great for Designs in the Hair Style
text: The variety of colors in this set makes it easy to create designs in your hair styles. I was able to overlap the pins with ease. They were also easy to remove and reuse

title: Beautiful Hair Clips
text: The pearl clips are just beautiful! They do not look cheap and they are sturdy. The fit and sit well on your hair without sliding off. You cam dress these clips up or down based on your outfit and/or occassion.

title: Nice Set of Shears
text:
This set of shears have a good weight to them and are beautiful to look at. The issue is that they needed to be sharpened. I can tell they are made with quality materials, but the opening and closing of the shears is janky.
But a sharpener should be on hand anyway with scissors like these so the fix should be easy

title: Beautiful Color!
text: I wanted to add color to my next set of box braids. This hair is perfect. The color is vibrant and has no smell. The package also came with two clips.

title: Great Color and Soft!
text:
The crochet hair is soft and stretchy. Each bag comes with alot of hair which is a plus. And there were also additional gifts in the package!
The down side is that there was alot of shedding hair that fell off of the hair. I assume that once the style is installed, the smaller hairs will have fallen off with no more shedding.
Overall, the hair is nice and had no loud smell to it.

title: For the Salon Professional!
text:
If you are a salon professional, then you know you can never have too many capes. This cape is all around great. It has a velcro closure as well as a tie around the neck.
The cape has a good length to it as well. It goes below the knee of an adult. It also has a silver side that helps with static cling. This is a great buy!

title: Ombre Box Braids
text:
I needed to find some ombre hair to do a box braid style. After opening the package, I was pleasantly surprised.
The hair feels good and has no smell. Another plus is that the hair is pre-stretched.

title: A nice lightweight serum to keep your skin hydrated.
text: It doesn't smell like plastic like someone said above. It smells like a light floral powder scent, which is cute, not over strong or horrible. It's hydrated enough for your skin and the bottle design is super simple and pure, like the product simply it is!

title: Great seller and product.
text: I little dusty inside the package (on the cosmetic containers) but overall the quality of product is good and authentic. Their content inside are also new. Wish I could know this store outside Amazon, I would come and check new products from this seller again and again as I'm a fan of Korean skincare.

title: Very great sanitizer if the scent and price are ok with you.
text:
I'm extremely satisfied with how newly this sanitizer was packed and sealed, it was shipped and sold by Amazon, maybe that is why! I already bought this sanitizer from Ulta and main site but I don't see they seal each mini bottle by plastic individually this way. This is a plus point for Amazon.
About the sanitizer, I know many people complain about its scent. Luckily, I already used the body lotion which is in same line with this sanitizer and has same scent, so at first when hearing too many complaints about the scent, I was not afraid much to try. Also, I like the design of this sanitizer bottle, it's square, cute with flip top cap which is very convenient to bring with you anywhere when you go out. I have tried lots of sanitizer brands during pandemic time, for me, I feel this is a very good sanitizer because it's creamy, thick but not greasy, dries very fast but doesn't make your hands dry at all, very comfortable after using and smells great (for me). The only thing that matters is the price. To be honest, for this size 66ml and more than $6 is too overpricing compared with same size sanitizers from other brands, even top brands like Purell or Safeguard. That's why I love it but I only bought 3 bottles as a big support from me to Hempz company and that's all. I would buy a whole box of this if I were a very rich girl as it's what I like, but my pocket will cry... So... Bye for now till I become much richer, lol...
Good job Amazon and Hempz.

title: The perfect bit of shine to add to your lips
text: I love this trio of lipgloss. The flavors are very popular fragrances of strawberry, grape, and bubblegum. The strawberry and the grape do appear to be slightly tinted, but you will not notice any real color added to your lips from them. You can use them alone and enjoy just a nice clear gloss over your natural color lips, or you can put it over top of your color and no worry of changing the color of your favorite lipstick. It will add a very nice bit of shine and a little bit of a sparkle to whatever color you decide to slide it over.  I do not notice a lot of flavor to these glosses, but the color is very pretty. I feel that the box is a nice addition if you plan on giving these as a gift. I think this would make a wonderful gift for a young girl or even an older lady. I can’t imagine anybody that wouldn’t enjoy receiving this trio of lip glosses. I felt the price was extremely fair and that the quality of this item was very good.

title: Great Variety of Sizes
text: This particular kit of nail art brushes had a good variety of different size brush heads.  I've got other kits and they tend to all either be really thin or larger.  This is a good kit to have because it's got a nice cross section of sizes to choose from.  I wanted a particular size to make snowflakes on my nails with snow dots and I can do both designs with this one kit.  I'm very happy with this section of brushes and the cost value too.

title: Nice feel and Great Color
text: I really love this color and the feel of this lipstick.  I was impressed too with how pretty the packaging was.  There's nothing nicer than when you take your lipstick out of your purse and everyone sees how pretty the tube is - but I digress.  This lipstick is a great nude color and goes well with just about anything I wear - be it red or pink.  You must always have a good versatile lipstick color in your purse at all times.  Your clothes change but you always take the same purse when you're out and about.  Your lipstick in that purse should go with everything you're wearing.  The feel of this lipstick is also very nice which is a huge plus.  I think the price is fair for such a nice quality lipstick.

title: Makeup Sponge Holder
text: One issue I've had in my makeup drawer is that I hate to just put my blender sponge in there without being inside something to keep it clean and sanitary.  This solves that problem nicely.  It's very soft and pliable and opens with a squeeze of the ends of the container.  It's very easy to use and your sponge fits nicely inside.  It seems quite durable and like it would last a good long time.  It's also easy to clean and allows circulation in case you wash your sponge and it's slightly damp.  The air holes will allow for proper circulation.  This is a really handy gadget!

title: Travel Electric Toothbrush Case
text: These toothbrush cases are a good size and you can fit your electric toothbrush inside easily if you remove the brush stem.  They won't rattle around in there because they have grooves where the brush and stem both can easily fit inside and clip into place.  The reason I gave these a 3 star rating was because the clip that is to keep the case closed doesn't really clamp or close right.  It's very loose and I think that you will need a rubber band to keep the case closed.  I know that's not really a big deal but given that I haven't even used these yet I can't blame wear and tear on the fact that the clasp doesn't work.  It didn't work from the moment I took it out of the box.  I suppose if you put this case inside a toiletry bag, it's unlikely it will open even without a rubber band so really, if you need something to pack up your electric toothbrush, these cases will work and hold most brands of electric toothbrush and the price was fair.

title: Sugar Scrub
text: This has a very pleasant scent and works quite well at exfoliating and moisturizing your skin.  I think the scent is a bit on the stronger side but it's pleasant and is more like something you'd smell in a spa for relaxation.  It's a small size tin so use sparingly.  A little goes a long way.  You will enjoy this little luxury very much.  It's a great value as well as a fun thing to use or gift to a friend.

title: Nail Care Cuticle Nippers and accessories
text: I ordered this mainly for the cutters.  This cuticle nipper has a double tension resistance and is easy to maneuver.  I like to keep my nails and cuticles looking good.  It's important to have the right quality tools.  This kit has the basics and the price is right.  Each item seems to be of high quality steel and feels good in your hand making them an easy way to keep your manicure and pedicure looking good.

title: Magicopper Film Mask
text: I wasn't sure what to expect when this arrive but I was pleasantly surprised at how breathable this mask is.  It's more formed and cone shaped on it's own which allows a breathing space between your face and the mask itself.  This makes this mask so easy to breath with.  I'm not used to using masks since I spend more time at home but when I do go out, I want a mask that doesn't make me feel like I'm struggling for breath.  This is the mask for you!  It not only is very safe and the harder shell surface will keep germs out, it's also a nice breathable mask.  The price is extremely fair as well.  It comes with a lanyard so you don't have to put your mask down on any dirty surface when not in use.  It can hang from your neck comfortably.  The inside of the mask is washable so you can use it again and again without fear.

title: Bar of Soap with Calendula Oil
text: It's got to be the Calendula oil that leaves your skin so moisturized after using this soap.  I first smelled the very subtle fragrance and thought I'd enjoy this soap enough to purchase it again till I also realized it's really moisturizing.  I think you'll be very happy with how it leaves your skin feeling most of all.  It's advertised as being all natural as well so if you have sensitive skin, you shouldn't have any problems with this although I'd always recommend trying a test patch first before using it in the shower all over.

title: Lavender Lotion
text: I love that this is Vegan!  It's got good things for your skin other than the relaxing qualities of Lavender.  It's got Vitamin A and Almond Oil in this lotion.  It comes out very thick and creamy.  The scent is amazing too.  It is very calming for you and I'd suggest using it right before bed.  It's just the ticket to a good sleep regimen.  You will love this lotion as much as I do I'm certain of it!

title: Dried Flower Buds
text: I want to explain why I didn't give this neat product a better rating.  First let me say that I do like the idea - i love it in fact.  I was so excited about receiving this product because it was so different and unique.  I wanted to learn how to use this product in different ways.  When I received it, I got the bag as pictured above and couldn't figure out what was inside.  There was no description on the outside at all.  I didn't know what was inside till I ripped the bag open. After I opened it, I immediately saw the beautifully colored foil wrapped buds and remembered "Oh yes, this is the flower buds that I saw that can be used as tea, bath pods and for baking."  There was no description, instructions or anything inside other than the beautifully foil wrapped buds.  I'm still left wondering how I will use them.  If I use for tea, I suppose I just wing it and drink the tea when I think it's done as there's no recipe for how long to steep to experience the perfect amount of flavor is extracted.  If I use for a bath, I'm sure there would be much more flexibility but it also advertises you can use for baking.  I have no idea how to use it for that.  If I wanted to use it for a gift, it would be incomplete not to mention that in order to even know what I ordered, I had to already open the pretty bag so that would ruin the presentation.  I feel this is a great product with great potential to be a high end gift or luxury indulgence.  They just have one more step to complete in the way of instructions and explanation on the packaging to make it achieve it's potential.  This idea could easily go viral and become very popular.

title: Reusable Makeup Removal Pads with Laundry bag
text: If you are concerned about the environment and like a simple way to remove your makeup, these are for you!  You use these microfiber pads once and you can wash them in a bag that is provided for you in this pouch.  It couldn't be easier or better for our environment.  I feel this would make an excellent gift for someone as well.  Everything you need is all included in this ziplock pouch.  It's a big savings financially to have pads that can be washed and reused over and over again.  I think you'll enjoy this product very much.

title: Coffee Scrub
text: I didn't notice a distinct fragrance from this scrub.  It does faintly smell of coffee but I had hoped there would be more of a spicy smell.  But, this is a nice feeling scrub against your skin.  It does make your skin feel energized.  I'm not sure how long it would take to make my cellulite become less visible but I will keep using it for the mere purpose that it does feel good.  I would say too that it would make a good gift because it's so unique.  I do recommend this product and for the price it's a good value for either a gift or keeping it for yourself as a treat.  Enjoy!

title: Mask Brackets
text: These really do help to make wearing a mask a little easier to breathe.  I don't like wearing mine and I don't have to for very long, but this does help with air circulation underneath your mask.  If you're having a hard time, give these a try.  They are a great value and seem to be very sturdy.

title: Cooling Natural Aloe Vera

title: WHY DIDN'T I GET THIS SOONER?!
text:
Oh my GAWWWD! This thing is amazing! This will be a lengthy review, but if you are like me, I hope you'll enjoy the very detailed essay I am about to write for the 2nd time because my original review closed out of the page :(

I will preface this by letting you know I have coarse, curly hair. "bUt hEaThEr, wHat nUmBer aNd pOroSitY aRe YoU?".
I am 3a-c and high porosity. Now, it is storytime LOL, so grab a snack or an adult bev.

Let me tell you about the root, no pun intended, of a good portion of my self esteem issues LOL. When I was a kid, I was teased relentlessly about my hair. Ah yes, even Rave/LA Looks gel, with a spritz of White Rain hairspray couldn't tame this! Kids are mean. I ran cross country all through high school, and with many mornings having only an hour to get ready after running until my bunions ached (what the heck heather, TMI!), I eventually learned the only way to keep these people from throwing tiny paper balls in my hair or touching it, was to throw it in a bun. Containment, if you will. That thing was so tight I could hardly think straight. Does that explain my grades lol? So, my hair means a lot to me, y'all!

Moving onto the stuff you really want to know, the magical brush I'm in love with💖

This brush has what I assume are nylon bristles. The only suggestion I have is to replace them with boar bristles, but it isn't a deal breaker. A few, and I mean 2 or 3, of those bristles came out when I was examining this baby before using it. It has pins and bristles all the way around and up and down. They don't tug at the hair or stretch it to damage or snap damp hair. I did brush my hair out with a wet brush before using, though.

The brush is so lightweight, I didn't think it was going to do much lol. Thank you to the manufacturer for making it so lightweight! It was such a breeze to brush the sections of hair. My wrists were happy :)

The brush does get hot, but not too hot! I accidentally touched the metal part a few times and I still have all my fingers! Yeehaw! There is a little knob that sticks out, to grasp onto as you roll the brush through your hair. You could probably use a straightening glove too! I have never used a Revlon brush, nor touched one irl. So, take that for what it is, but I've watched A LOT of videos on YouTube with that specific brush. I believe the Revlon is heavier and hotter than this brush. I have heard of some gals smelling burning. I did not experience that. I did use a heat protectant (up to 450°) along with a leave in cream. By the way, there is an air (I assume cool) setting, which is amazing as it is actually regar air! Not semi warm air like some dryers I've used in the past. The low setting is low and the high is faster and hotter. They light up so you know what is what! Love it.

Please don't expect this to smooth it out like a flat iron would. This provides the perfect base though, to smooth with a flat iron quickly. It took me from start to finish about 50 mins. Some of that time was spent sectioning and spraying the hair with protectant, as well as doing some house stuff. Realistically it maybe took 40 mins. I did wait after my wash and condition, to let the hair dry a little bit. To about 85%. I even spritzed dry sections with water as needed, so my brush could glide through. I've only used this 2x. Once on wet hair and once for a touch up. I'm hoping to be as good as Julissa Guillen on YouTube, as I use this more :) maybe I'll be faster and it'll be smoother too!

I used this before bedtime, so I don't have a day of wear pics available for you.

But, the second pic shows my hair wet, unbrushed.

The third pic is right after finishing! AMAZING! I was literally in awe! Couldn't believe it. Even after cosmetology school, I couldn't master a blowout on myself *cries*

The fourth pic is the next morning. Slept on a regular cotton pillowcase (I should get a satin one from Amazon lol). I left it down while I slept btw.

The last pic is after a go through with the flat iron. I didn't have to section my hair for once to flat iron my hair! I just ran it through with some more heat protectant as well, a must have :D

Besides the boar bristle suggestion, I did notice the words on the dryer are already faded. It doesn't affect the dryer, so I really don't care lol. The other thing was the twisty thing to turn the dryer on, doesn't line up directly with the lights and words (OFF, AIR, LOW, HIGH). Again, I don't care but everyone different, so I wanted to let you beautiful awesome people know!

Overall, I am so impressed and so upset at myself for not getting one of these sooner. Can't beat the value and it comes with a warranty. Thank you HAUSBELL, I LOVE YOU!❣💞🥰💇‍♀️

title: Great glass files
text:
These files are fantastic. I really like the fact that they're not etched like any other glass file. They do a great job at filing natural nails without all that ear splitting, teeth hurting, grinding noise other glass files make.

As far as buffing/polishing goes, yes, they do make a naked, natural nail shiny. But unless your nail is free of bumps, humps, divots, etc., it's going to take a long time to shine the nail evenly. What you end up doing is making thin/weak spots in the nail which will cause breaks or cracks as the nail grows out because these files take off a lot of nail. You can get shinier nails quicker with a base coat.

title: Nice set
text:
"Jeff's Wife" - I got these when they were an Add-On Item for $3.99, definitely worth the price. The stamper works great, I didn't even wash it first (even though you should always wash new stampers before first use), and it's slightly (I do mean slightly) softer then other clear stampers I own.

If you're new to stamping or not familiar with clear stampers, they are more delicate than opaque ones and tear easily, so be gentle with it. Wash it with dish soap & warm water, dry with a paper towel and clean it with a lint roller or tape. Never buff it or use acetone, you'll make it cloudy defeating the purpose of a clear stamper. When picking up, ROLL GENTLY over the image if you apply too much pressure it won't pick up. When applying the image to the nail press straight down (again, with GENTLE pressure) and rock side to side or roll from side to side. Don't push the tip of the nail into it, it will tear.

All the plates stamp great, I didn't swatch every image, although plates 29 & 41 have shallow etching (in my experience this is normal for BP plates) so the thinner scraper is a nice addition. It's not as thin as the 0.5mm and not a thick as the 1mm ones I own, I'd say it's 0.75mm (I didn't get out the calipers). There are different size images, a little for every nail size. But I do wish the water marble designs were bigger, I'm not a Water Marble Witch yet. Plate 52 is great for lead lighting or Sharpie water coloring.

The stamping guide works like it's supposed to, I've added a photo to show how it's used just in case it's confusing. I have a set of 4 templates from another brand already, there's not much difference in size or thickness of the metal but the designs are different. The edges aren't finished, like a plate with no backing, but I don't think it would cause anyone to slice their finger open unless you're being extremely careless.

All in all a great set.

title: Good for Nail Art
text:
"Jeff's Wife" - This is not true to color, it dries quite a bit darker, as you can see from the pic, but since I only use it for nail art I don't care but some of you might. It may leave a few specks of the shimmer on your skin when you peel it off but they wipe away effortlessly.

If you're new to nail art and want to use this for that, I do suggest you transfer some to an empty polish bottle (cleaned with acetone or brand new doesn't matter) using a syringe with some sort of tip, an eye dropper or even a straw, this will keep the large bottle from drying out. This 4 oz bottle will last you a very long time, I still have about half the bottle I bought in Feb. 2015, and costs a fraction of the price as those other brands marketed specifically for nail art.

title: Good when it works
text: I got this for my wife as she has been getting really good at doing her own dip powder nails at home. She started out with cheaper 20$ drills and I thought now she has the hang of it she could use a more professional one. I got her the green and she was so excited to use it. She charged it up so it was ready to use on her next manicure day. It comes with a USB charging cord, a cord to connect the drill to the power bank, and drill bits. There’s also a little plastic holder that connects to the main part of the device to hold the drill. She really likes the digital screen, it shows the battery charge, the power number you’re working with, and what direction the drill goes. There is a power button and a reverse button and the screen has a dial around it to move change the speed setting which goes to 30. To insert the drill bit, rather than just pushing it in like on the cheaper drills with these you twist the bottom of the “pen” open, insert the bit, and twist it back to lock it again. She noticed immediately how much stronger it was even in the first set. She was easily able to turn it up to about a 3, however, as she was using it she noticed it started to slow down and after using it for a minute or two it would stop and say there was an error. This happened at least 3 times during her manicure which seems odd and unreliable. If it weren’t for that she would love it but it did kind of lower her opinion and rating of it as she couldn’t figure out why it kept happening.

This was the first time ever doing anything like this for me and my husband so we werent sure what to expect with the process. When you take these out I will caution you to watch how much you cute the parts that go on your feet as I cut my husband's too wide and some of the liquid that is inside did come out. So you know there is liquid inside each of the bags that go on your feet that feels weird on your feet and cold. We left on for the recommended time of an hour the process is explained in detail which I will give them kuddos for. Now after we let them stay on for an hour we then showered them off I placed lotion on my feet the first night again not sure what to expect and I didnt want this to dry my feet out too much as to where my husband didnt have a preference so he did not lotion his feet. He started seeing the peeling first. Now keep in mind I do get pedis and my last one was probably in March of 2020 and since then I have used a foot file and soak during that time. My peeling did not start until halfway thru the week so I thought that was important to mention. He does not get his feet done and never has. His peeling lasted about a week. We are about what a week and half in of peeling 2 weeks in since I did the foot mask my feet still look aweful and they are still peeling. I have started to apply lotion to the feet to see if this will help the process and only have seen minimal improvement. Now keep in mind I am an impatient person. Also to mention a burning and tingling sensation is expected its what we felt during the process once we were done. Overall I think I will stick to my parifan drips and doing my feet the way I have been doing I will say that it did wear down a few calluses I had on my feet its just the process I am not patient enough for I dont mind wearing socks too much but this is more of being forced to wear socks so I dont shed everywhere and even then I still find dead skin somewhere. This process was horrible to me and I think there are better ways to get these results. My husband didnt too much mind the process and his feet were in worse conditon than mind and his process didnt take as long and for me that was even more frustrating. This would not be something I would recommend unless you are a patient person and dont mind waiting like this for results I just want to let my feet breath again.

Update: 2/2 My foot is still peeling this is def something I will not be doing again for me its about the fact that this is suppose to be something that takes time but really this amount of time for me is ridiculous and I can get the results its providing by using a foot file after soaking is that process more difficult yes but I get results within an hour not almost a month. My feet look nasty and dry even lotion isn't helping.

title: Great quality, works great for thick,long,curly hair, and works wonders
text: This is my second set of these brushes I originally got these for my middle daughter and we keep one in her bathroom and one in the kitchen for the times I put a hair mask in her hair and use these combs to get the tangles out and the product into each part of her hair up to her root. So when my oldest seen these and I used them in her hair she was like ok I want one now too and then I also thought these would be great for my son who also has tons of hair and curly hair at that. So now everyone has one and I think I may sadly be getting another set for my daughters when there at their dads house too. They love these brushes and I have to attest using these to comb thru their hair makes things a world easier and less of a hassle I do wish they had a grip on the handle for wet hands but really outside of that I dont have any complaints. These come in packs of 2 and even if you dont have kids using one in a purse and keeping one home is enough reasons to get these especially if you have thick hair these are amazing. My kids are mixed and range from hair length to neck length to butt length and I will tell you these are amazing at handling getting thru those thick tangles. The back has a piece that allows you to have the comb itself at different firmness I like the top one personally it is the firmest level. Overall if I am not a fan I dont know who is but I know for sure I have 4 and I will have 6 by the end of the year.

title: Easy to use,works great and has a sensor inside so you dont have to push buttons
text: I am totally new to the idea and concept when it comes to doing gel nails at home myself. This was the first time I have owed and used a UV lamp by myself to cure my nails. I def like the initial unpackaging the machine itself looks professional and well made. It plugs into the wall the cord could be a tad longer but it was workable. I didnt read over the instructions since I have seen this machine be used both in the nail salon on a number of ocassions not regularly but I am a quick study. I have also seen ppl I watch on youtube use machines like this as well so I was familar with the concept of what your suppose to do. Now I did pair this with gel polish that I had never used before so my review may not be the best since I am unfamilar with both the product and the products used but it is coming from a first time user as I am sure there are others out there like myself. So in use I will say the machine does get warm not hot but warm depending on how long your using it. The light is very bright and def caught me off guard. The buttons are extremely easy to use but I love that the machine also has a sensor so you dont have to push the button if you dont need to which I thought was a nice touch. The only downside of that is if you lift your palm up then it goes off so its extremely important to pay attention to the numbers you were on for curing sake. I will say thou using this machine at first with the base coat that I was using it came out tacky so my first thought is great I was excited about using this and it doesnt all the way work but once I thought to just go ahead and apply the first layer of polish, cure, and then do the top coat everything was fine. So overall this works great and I look forward to using again in the future as I begin experimenting with both gel polish and poly gel (I think its called). As stated I am a quick study and I dont think I did too bad of a job my first time around.

title: Thin but not to thin perfect for toner, feels soft, and don't leave behind fuzzies
text:
For reference: Comparing to an affordable drugstore version which is pictured on the right with this version on the left.

Impressions upon unpackaging was that I didn't think I would like these they felt thin and the other brand is fluffier. So it made me think that they wouldn't hold up well. title: Takes time and patience
text: I choose these because I've seen these before product curls without the heat and it was as simple as applying them and letting your hair air dry. Well let me tell you it takes alot of practice and patience and knowing what your doing. Is it simple enough to understand, yes. However the sectioning hair, getting tangled, knotted or stuck was alot of the problems I ran into. If my husband had not been home I think I might have been in some real trouble. I'm not mild tempered and almost was pulling my hair out trying to get it unstuck at some points. I will say there were times when I got a rhythm going and I was getting my hair to go thru effortlessly but in the end once I was done I found pieces that weren't even in there and it was uncomfortable to wear unless maybe I was up doing stuff around the house. In the end I took it down and I'd had enough of the torture these provided. Overall would I suggest these yes to someone a little more familiar with there head and maybe to do in my daughter's hair but personally unless it's a day I'm bored and nothing else to do I may give it a go again. I will say my husband did see some curls in my hair when I ended up taking them out they didn't stay that way but he said he could see results and that was just in a matter of getting them all in. There may be potential there just not patience in my book.

title: Another great L'ange product!
text: I've tried a couple L'ange products with the sea salt spray being my favorite. I love this fortifying detangler as well! My hair is fine which means its fragile. title: Not for combination skin type.
text: At 30 something, I wanted to start taking better care of my skin. I was excited to try this Infusion Oil. Many referred to this as the game changer. But sadly this wasn't a product for me. title: Great to add umph! to your messy bun!
text: My hair is a 3/4 medium to dark brown with some red undertones. I went with the 1b natural black because the 4 was described as light brown. Light brown is usually a 5. text:

title: Great coverage for acne scared skin!
text:
I love this Phoera foundation and the BB cream works well with the foundation.
This foundation provides great coverage. I have acne-prone skin and have uneven tones, dark spots ​, and acne scars and this foundation does a great job in covering all the imperfections. A pea-size amount covers most of my face so a little goes a long way. I don't like thick layers of make-up, since it clogs my pores up, so I usually just wear one coat and one coat of this foundation provides great coverage. The BB cream has a thin consistency and does good in blending tones, but not the dark spots (which I expected because of the consistency). I have been wearing this foundation for about 2 weeks (off & on) and it does not cause ( additional) break-outs.
The primer works well and I like the brush, but the best part of this set (for me) is the foundation.

title: CGM friendly, minty scent
text:
Let me start by saying that the pump came broken, which is unfortunate. However, I was still very excited to try this shampoo because of the great ingredients.

I have been following the Curly Girl Method (CGM) for more than 2 years and I have seen great results with my hair. So I am very strict when choosing hair care products avoiding parabens, sulfates, drying alcohol, non-water soluble waxes. This shampoo does not have any of those 'bad ingredients' and love seeing Aloe Vera is the very first ingredient since it is a great ingredient in general.

It does clean the scalp nicely, leaving a minty sensation. It is important to call out that since it does not have sulfates (which is the most common ingredient in regular shampoo to clean the scalp but can be harsh), you will need to scrub your scalp a bit more with your fingers tips (this is the same with any sulfate free shampoo).

Overall rating due to broken pump: 4.5 rounding up to 5

Full Ingredient List: Aloe Barbadensis (Organic Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice*, Rosa Centifolia (Organic Rose Hydrosol)* Flower Water, Sodium Cocoate (Saponified Coconut) Oil, Vegetarian Glycerin, Plant Cellulose, Citrus Aurantium Sinensis (Orange) Fiber, Coffea Arabica (Green Coffee) Leaf/Seed Extract, Caffeine, Mentha (Mint) Extract, Rice Ferment Filtrate (Sake), Biotin, Vitamin B3, Vitamin B6, Extracts of Camellia Sinensis (Organic Green Tea) Leaf*, Panax Ginseng (Ginseng) Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower/Leaf/Stem, Mentha (Mint) Essential Oil, Lonicera Caprifolium (Japanese Honeysuckle), Acetum Mali (Apple Cider Vinegar), Curcuma Longa (Tumeric) * Certified Organic

title: Paraben on the ingredients? No thanks!
text:
I won't recommend this product because it contains methylparaben, yes I know many skin care products contains parabens, but that is definitely an ingredient among synthetic Fragrances, that I avoid.

For context, there are scientific researches that suggest that parabens can disrupt hormones in the body, increase the risk of cancer and can also cause skin irritation.

title: Affordable and great ingredients
text:
I have tried many many face sheet masks. While I did not notice anything special about these ones while using them, I can still think they are a great option because: 1) They are affordable ($2 per mask) and 2) Ingredients are all safe and clean (more details below).

I have used them at night, right before bed, usually leave them on for 15 minutes. Once I removed them, my skin feels fresh. The following morning, I feel my face moisturized and soft. There is enough serum to apply on the neck and chest area. There is no need to rinse after using them. Great option to use after a facial. It covers pretty well all face. I had to fold the nose area because of a recent nose ring, but it does cover the nose as well.

Regarding the ingredients, I use skincare ingredient analyzers that follow the EWG, which individually rates ingredients from 1 to 10 (lowest to highest hazard). I was impressed to see all ingredients are rated EWG1. Another interesting fact around ingredients is that there are no parabens, sulfates, silicones, alcohols, allergens and fragrances (a very common ingredient that is highly hazard).

Expiration date: 2025 (3 years after received)

title: Get the job done, nice scent
text:
I am not a big fan of makeup remover wipes, even less the ones that come individually because they just generate unnecessary trash. I prefer reusable wipes that work just fine with water. However, there are some situations where you will definitely need them in this presentation.

While taking a look at the ingredients, I noticed the second ingredient is "cyclopentasiloxane" which is a silicone, EWG 3 (low high hazard) and was a bit concern since silicones tend to clog pores and are difficult to wash off. However, after a bit more research about this particular silicone, looks like this is a low molecular type of silicone that washes off easily and won't clog pores if it is wash after you use it. So make sure to follow up your regular beauty routine of removing make up and cleanse your face. Haven't had any breakout after using these wipes.

Only reason why dropping one star is the price.

title: Another great product of Skinesque, although questionable time saver
text:
I have mixed emotions about these prep sheet masks. On one hand, this is a skincare brand I like a lot after trying 2 other products from them. They have high standards on their products, as well as in the ingredients used. The actual sheet masks work like charm in prepping the skin. However, I am not exactly sure they are saving me time. Overall I feel they are adding those 3 extra minutes to my routine, which may not sound liek a lot of time, but in the mornings, every minute count! Usually, after cleansing my face, it takes me 1 to 2 minutes applying toner and moisturizing cream, including the time to let each product be absorbed. When using these sheet masks, I have to leave them for 3 minutes and wait about 2 minutes to let the remaining serum be absorbed.

What I absolutely love about this product:
- Comes in a nice container not too big that can easily fit into your sink/beauty area.
- Tweezer are included as well as a place inside the same lid to attach it!
- Scent is absolutely enjoyable, it is a sweet fresh scent that is noticed since you take out the sheet mask. Surprisingly, there are no synthetic fragrances added.

Overall rating:
Presentation: 5
Quality ingredients: 5
Time-saver: 4

title: Beautiful package, effective product!
text:
There is no doubt Korean beauty products are the best. These cleansing pads are such a great addition to your night beauty routine.
It comes in a great quality bottle, comes sealed, includes some tweezers to avoid contaminating all other pads.

It has a sweet fresh scent that is very pleasant. One pad is enough to remove makeup, eyes included. Once you are done, it leaves a slightly oily feeling which is absorbed pretty fast. I thought I wouldn't like that feeling since I am not a big fan of greasy feeling on my face. However, this is very light and helps moisturizing the skin.

Regarding the ingredients, I am happy to see it does not contain any synthetic fragrance that is high hazard for the skin and it is a very common ingredient in skin care products. It also contains jojoba oil that is very moisturizing and Centella Asiatica (Cica) that soothes and brighten the skin. Not to mention Eggplant extract that has antioxidants.

The only callout would be to include a way to keep the tweezers attached to the lid, this way you don't have to put them on top of the wipes or keep them outside the closed bottle that could possibly get lost.

title: Great for skin and hair!
text:
This is an awesome product. It is a mix of cold press oils plus other extra ingredients that makes the whole mix very moisturizing. It is great for skin and hair and I will breakdown the reasons for each one.

Skin:
One pump is enough for your face. First time, I tried 2 pumps and it was very oily and took sometime to get absorbed. Since it's greasy, I only use it during my PM routine, to avoid excess of oil during the day and greasy look.
I ran the ingredients through the EWG database and they are all EWG 1, meaning they are low hazard for the skin. There are also no paraben, sulfates, or any other bad ingredients that are high hazard for skin such as fragrance that is a very common and very bad ingredient.

Hair:
I have followed the Curly Girl Method (CGM) for over a year now, which recommends avoiding ingredients that are not too good for scalp and hair such as sulfates, drying alcohols, non-water soluble waxes, parabens and silicones. None of these are included in this product. I have been using this oil as pre-poo, which is basically adding 2 pumps into my scalp and 2 more into my hair (wavy, length half way back) before taking a shower and leaves my hair soft and moisturized.

With the above explanation on ingredients I avoid for my skin and hair, it is difficult to find a product that meet both requirements, but this product does!!

title: Soothing pads!!
text:
I like having these type of toner pads (anything with cica) for when I start seeing hormonal acne appearing on my cheeks and jaw area. In a matter of 4-5 days I see significant improvement.
Little tweezers are included to grab only the pad to be used and avoid cross-contamination.

These pads contain great ingredients, especially no synthetic fragrance that is very common in tons of skin care products and is high hazard. It also does not have other "bad" ingredients such as parabens or sulfates.

I highly recommend using them consistently to see better results.

Expiration date: 04/14/2024 (~2.5 years from the date received).

title: One of the best face rollers I have ever tried!!
text:
This is now by far my favorite face roller. I have tried quite a few face rollers including materials like rose, and green quartz, stainless steel, regular single rollers and 2 rollers such as this one.
This design in particular is very easy to roll throughout the face. It is not as heavy as a similar design I have but with rose quartz spheres.
Feels cooler for a longer time since it is stainless steel and more importantly, it is not porous which avoids bacteria contamination on your face.
I use this roller almost every night while watching TV, which feels very soothing and relaxing.
Great gift for anyone!

title: Way to many headband options!
text:
This set has a great variety of headbands, whether you like them twisted, wide, printed or single color. They feel good quality, are soft and stretchy.

There are 4 styles: 1) Wide printed band, 2) Not too wide (but still a little wider than regular ones) one-colored band, 3) Twisted printed band and 4) Twisted one-colored band.

I think this set is a great value, 18 headbands for $18.99!

title: Moisturizing hand cream!!
text:
This is a very moisturizing hand cream. It is not too thick, it leaves your hands a little greasy but it is absorbed fast. It has a slight fresh scent.
Each tube comes in a gift box in case you are giving them away. All 4 tubes come sealed.
Size is perfect to keep it in a drawer, in your purse or backpack.
I keep one in my night stand to use it at night since aloe is really good to moisturize and keep hands soft. This way I let the hand cream being absorbed all night and wake up with soft hands.

title: Thin and not durable
text:
I am a big fan of nail wraps because of all the different designs and how easy it is to do your nails. However, I was disappointed with these ones on the 3rd day.

Application was pretty straight forward like many others. Comes with a small nail file and alcohol pad to remove all the oil from your nails. I had to use my own wood stick to push the cuticles back. They looked great on day 1 and 2, however, after that, 2 nails started chipping and one (the ring finger) had a hole on it! Now idea how that happened, I'm not doing anything rough/tough with my hands!

Anyway, they do not peel off however they seem to be very thin that are not durable at all. There is no way these wraps will last 14 days as advertised.

Also, on the instructions, they did not recommend applying a top coat once done, since the supposed to have that top coat already. But it might be worth adding a top coat layer on your own to make them last a couple of extra days.

title: Great for Korean 7-skin method!!
text:
This product is a great option if you want to do the Korean 7-skin method, which consists on cleansing your face and then applying 7 layers of a toner or a lightweight, watery essence to your face and after that moisturize your face. This will help your skin to keep moisturized throughout the day and be radiant and bouncy all day long. I do method once a week and every other day do 3 to 5 layer depending on how I feel/see my skin.

Full Ingredient List:
Sedum Sarmentosum Extract, Butylene Glycol, Water, 1,2-Hexanediol, Glycerin, Glycereth-26, Polyglutamic Acid, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Ceramide NP, Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, Xylitol, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Citrus Tangerina Peel Oill, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia Oil, Glucose, Phospholipids, Diethoxyethyl Succinate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Ammonium Acryloyldimethyltaurate/VP Copolymer, Hydrogenated Lecithin, C12-13 Pareth-9, Disodium EDTA, Chlorphenesin

title: Caps do to stay put!
text:
Great selection of lip liner. Some of the shades are very similar, however that allows me to match almost exactly my current lipsticks.
They run smooth while doing my lips, no scent or flavor at all.
Only reason why I am dropping one star is because the caps do not stay put!! It is so frustrating (almost dropping to 3 stars) to keep looking for the caps only to realized they made a mess inside you makeup bag. I took them all and put them in a pencil holder, otherwise I would have loose my mind by now.

title: Way too expensive
text:
Nice soap with a fresh smell. One pump is enough and lathers nicely. It left a nice sensation on my hands after using this soap, not dry at all.
Pump works great, the bottle has a nice design. It contains good ingredients, however I cannot justify the price, I mean $29.95 for 8.45 fl oz?

title: Effective, nice scent, great touch dispenser bottle
text:
When I think about nail polish remover, the first thing that comes to my mind is the strong not-so-pleasant acetone scent. However, this nail polish has removed that association. It has a sweet smell that is not strong and somehow pleasant.
I had no issues while removing purple nail polish from my toes. It did not tinted my skin like other acetone based nail polish removers. It also left my toes a little oily, which is also something totally different to what I am used to after removing nail polish because it's usually the opposite.
The touch dispenser bottle is awesome, just push it down and your cotton ball will get wet avoiding spills. I don't want to go back to the regular bottles after this one!!!

title: Great mascara, great price, environmental friendly company!
text:
I absolutely love this mascara, it was easy to apply, no issues with the bristles. It does not flake or smudge. When I removed it, it was very easy, I did not even needed to use makeup remover, I just got one of my reusable pads, got it wet, rubbed my eyes a few times and done.

In addition to the above, it is hypoallergenic and package and overall the ingredients are environmental friendly. This brand does seem to care about what type of ingredients are being used and our planet.

title: Frontline not cool
text:
Great highlights, soft hair, does not tangle a lot like make other straight wigs.
Just the frontline does not look real, it is a bit thick.

title: Puffy reusable pads
text:
I am a big fan of reusable pads. I have tried several kind of pads, thin, thick, tiny, medium size. They are soft, puffy and thick, however they are a little difficult to clean up your face easily due to this thickness.

The package comes with 3 so you can wash them often and still have one available always.
They all have a ribbon to be able to hang it once used.

title: Soft and good bangs
text:
Good wig, pink color is just as expected. The combination from black to pink looks amazing. Bangs are good length.
Only reason why I am dropping 1 star is because you can see how the black layers are cut after a few inches and looks weird.

title: Amazing and fluffy wig
text:
When I saw the pictures of this wig, I kind of like it but wasn't sure how it would look like on me since I am used to have longer wigs, at least shoulder length. But decided to give it a try.
When I received it, I was impressed by the look and texture. I instantly love it!
The wig is fluffy, cut on the back looks amazing, a little shorter than the actual pictures, but still nice.
The headband is adjustable, so it is really comfortable when wearing it.
It comes with a certificate that says it has 70% human hair. This is why I assume it is a little more expensive than other wigs.
No need to style it, the pics I took were taken as soon as I took it out of the bag.

title: Very absorbent, good quality
text:
These microfiber turbans are great. They have to layers of microfiber which make them more absorbent than other towels I have tried. There are 2 buttons to adjust how tight you want to leave the turban.
I love using microfiber on my wavy hair since it avoid frizz, and they are lighter than using regular towels as turbans. Also, my hair is mid-back length and fit nicely.
The only down side is that they have a weird chemical scent when I took them out of the plastic bag, but went away after I washed them.

title: Very nice wig, natural looking
text:
This is one of the nicest wigs I have ever tried (a little over 10 now).
I totally like the natural feeling and looking of it. Color was as expected.
Very easy to put on, to comb, it sheds a little, but that is normal for new wigs. There was some static, which is also normal for synthetic wigs, but after applying some leave-in for wigs it was ok.
Comes with a mesh cap
The bangs are a somewhat long for my taste, but that is good because you can style them or cut them as needed.

title: Flexible brush, great for detangling wavy/curly hair!
text:
I like that you can adjust the comb rows depending on how thick your hair is. It is a little bigger to regular brushes.
I only use this detangling brush on my wet hair to avoid damaging or breakage, either inside the shower after conditioner or after shower before applying leave-in and curl cream.
The curved brush really adapts well to the shape of the head, it feels like a massage when running it through your entire head and hair.
It is flexible when trying to detangle.

title: Great variety of poly gels
text:
9 different colors you can choose from, 3 of them are glitter/sequins. A free gift is included which is basically gold glitter.

The dual forms are way to big for my hands, good thing I had another set of dual forms already.
It also comes with the "gold stickers" nail extensions in case you want to mold your nails from the top. But you got to have some practice to follow this approach. Otherwise, it will take you forever to distribute and mold your nails.

All poly gels come sealed. They do match the color listed on the outside of the little bottle. Even though they are small, they can last a few rounds since you don't need a lot of product for each nail.

Once the poly gel is cured, you will need to apply a top coat since they are sticky after cured.

title: Different container, soft hair, CGM approved
text:
I was a little confused when I got this leave-in because I was expecting a bottle with a pump and instead I got a tub with product all over the place.
This leave-in cream is very runny, fruity scent a little too strong for me. Although after I applied it into my hair, it wasn't that bad.
I have incorporated a few times now into my regular routine (shampoo, conditioner, leave-in, curl cream and gel) and it has worked well so far. Hair feels soft and define. The way I applied it was on damp hair, making sure product was evenly distributed.
One thing to consider when using it, is not to apply too much product on your hair, I used about 2 dime size on all my hair. For thin hair I would recommend half of it, otherwise hair will look very greasy.
Lastly, ingredients are very good for your hair. I have been following the Curly Girl Method (CGM) for about 6 months and one of the major recommendations is to avoid parabens, silicones, sulfates, non-water soluble waxes and drying alcohols, and all ingredients in this leave-in are safe to use if you are following the CGM as well.

title: Good set at a nice price
text:
Good set of hair claw clips, 6 in total, 2 of each color blue, gold and kind of cooper. Colors are exactly as pictures in the description, matte finish. 10 hair ties are also included that will not pull your hair.

They are medium size and do grab a good amount of hair which do not slip down the hair.

Plastic feels a little flexible in comparison with other hair clips, which could be a sign of durability.

title: Nice color, great length!
text:
Nice wig for cosplay, Halloween costume, or in case you want to totally change your hair for a day!
I don't think this is a daily wig, but it is definitely good quality.
It comes with a mesh to help keeping your hair inside the wig. Also, it has straps to adjust it.
Hair is soft but has a little static, I will be applying some leave-in to help with that.

title: Slippery than regular liquid hand soaps
text:
This liquid hand soap is different from other/regular ones. It feels similar to slime, thinner than regular slime though, but definitely a slippery sensation. It might not be pleasant for all people. I had no problem at all.
1 pump is good enough for thoroughly washing your hands.
It does smells like lemongrass, not too strong, but you can definitely tell it is lemongrass.

title: Perfect to reduce frizz!
text:
I love this set!! Microfiber is the best especially for wavy/curly hair. It helps minimize frizz and it is very absorbent.

I found very useful the turban for whenever I am doing my makeup or I am just at home and don't want to touch my hair to avoid getting tangled or frizzy. I haven't really used it after a shower.

The twist head towel is great for plopping your head for some time after shower. My routine using this has been: right after shower, apply leave-in, curl cream, and plop for 20 min using this twist head towel. After that, I remove the towel, apply gel and diffuse for 15-20 min. Also, I wear it "backwards". I know the button should be at the bottom of the head, but I found using it at the top also works for me.

title: High quality but pricey
text:
Nice to have nowadays! Conveniently individually wrapped. They claimed to be unscented refresh, but they do have a slightly non-pleasant scent. Wipes are light beige with tiny brownish dots, nothing wrong with that but just different to the white plain wipes we are used to see everywhere.

Package (both box and each wipe) is nice and high quality. Price seems to be a little high. But given the fact they are all natural (paraben-free, cruelty free, plant-based, aluminum free, etc.) and conveniently individually wrapped in case you need to get one handy in your pocket or pursue and don't have to bother with a hand sanitizer bottle (even the small ones), I think it's worth having them as an emergency. Definitely not for daily use (or several in a day).

title: Thick and good quality
text:
This is a good set of gel nail polish. Bottle size is average from other brands I have tried (usually between 6-8 ml), these bottles contain 7.5 ml. Gel is thicker that most brands, which is kind of good and bad at the same time. Good because you can get a great coverage with 2 thin layers. However, it is a little more difficult to apply, especially the white one that is super thick, but you will get a perfect white!

Like any other set that does not come with base and top coat, make sure to get them before trying to use this nail polish on its own. They won't last if not using base and top coat.

Not a fan of bottles that do not include the sticker with the color, just the number, so you either apply it to the bottle and cure them or get some nail watches, cure them and have them handy when choosing colors.

I have not tested the durability of them (it would depend a lot of the quality of your base and top coat and how well you prep your nails). But so far, I am please with the texture and color set.

title: Excellent nail drill
text:
This nail drill is an excellent choice when doing your nails or re-doing them!
I have used it with gel nail polish and acrylic nails and works wonders.
USB cable only, no adapter included, but you can use any other you already have (~5V needed).
It is really powerful compare to other non-wired I have tried. You can regulate the speed as well. Super easy to operate, on/off switch and rotating button for adjusting the speed.
I like that it comes with all kind of bits, sanding bands and cuticle remover bits which are easy to swap.

title: Good portable set of spray and pump bottles
text:
This is a good set of spray and pump bottles. Full disclosure, they are small: 100ml/3.4 oz for the spray bottle (which is the approved size when using in your carry-on on a plane) and 60 ml/2 oz for the pump bottles.

Pump bottles have a removable lock cap.

My only complain (reason why I am rating 4 stars) is that one of the spray bottles came crushed, but I got 2 other spray bottles in perfect condition. Package was not damage at all, so I am not sure at what point of the delivery process was smashed like that.

Any way besides that, they all work great, totally worth the money!

title: Good mascara with a tweak
text:
This is a good mascara. The brush is a little curve so it can help with the application.

My first impression wasn't that good, since the mascara felt so thin that looks like I wasn't really wearing almost anything. It dried so fast that when I tried to apply the second layer, it wouldn't let me because it was already dry and the brush wouldn't run nice and soft through my lashes. However, I added 2-3 drops of castor oil (you can also use almond oil or any other natural oil that you like) and it was a game changer. I instantly felt the brush was running smoothly on my lashes, and was able to apply a second and even third layer with no problem. Lashes looked way better (not to mention they were also being lubricated with the added oil).

Pros:
- Does not smudge
- Easy to remove with makeup remover or even in the shower
- When removed, it comes out in small flakes which is great because it does not leave you with raccoon eyes

Cons:
- Very thin mascara (although this might be a pro for some people)
- Felt a little dry at the beginning but manage to "enhance" it with castor oil (as mentioned above)

title: Good quality design set!
text:
Let me start by saying ... I LOVE the look of these tools. The rhinestones inside a clear handle gives them such an attractive and high quality look.

The bristles/brushes are all different sizes, same thickness. Would be nice to have a variety of thickness as well. But they are soft and work great when drawing lines or mostly any design.

The metal part at both ends make them feel sturdy and durable.

My only complain is that the 2nd size dotter (the pink one) is not as soft as the other. It's a bit sharp which does not work when trying to use it, but other than that all good. This is the only reason I give them 4 stars.

I highly recommend this set!!

title: Not a set of 10
text:
This is advertised and sold as a ten piece set of nail polishes, but its actually two separate sets with almost identical colors. One set of 6 smaller bottles come in a clear plastic zip-lock cosmetic bag, and a second box of 4 larger bottles. The set of 6 smaller bottles also comes with a glittery toe separator and kitty-shaped emory board. The set of 4 larger bottles also comes with 50 nail stickers.

These are the colors that you get:
Gold glitter (a small and a large bottle)
Baby blue (small and large bottle)
Baby pink (small and large bottle)
Violet (small and large bottle)

Additional small bottles:
A slightly brighter baby pink
A deeper pink

I took a photo to show you that the polish is the correct consistency and I applied it to my nails easily. It dries quickly. Since this is water-based nail polish meant for little girls, it wears off quickly. And you can peel it off very easily. That way, you don’t need harsh nail polish remover to take it off.

This is not really suitable as a single 10 piece gift set since the bottles come in two totally separate packages of 4+6, and since ALL of the 4 larger bottles duplicate with the same color that is included in the set of 6 smaller bottles. It is better as two separate (but similar) gifts.

I write honest reviews to help others make informed purchases becasue I read reviews myself and appreciate how helpful they can be. I hope that my review helped you!

title: Nice gift set!
text:
I got the set with the insulated tumbler cup that says “Beauty begins the moment you love yourself.” The outside of the gift box says “Thinking of you.” This would make a really nice gift set for someone who is going through a tough time. It includes a small scented candle in a glass pot with a metal lid; the tumbler cup with a washable straw and brush; a wine bottle stopper; a cute key that I think must just be a decoration; two bath bombs; and a bar of rose-scented pink soap.

This particular set is listed at just under $35. I think that might be a bit high for this. But if you are looking for a convenient set that you don’t have to put together yourself, this is a nice set.

I write honest reviews to help others make informed purchases because I read reviews myself and appreciate how helpful they can be. I hope that my review helped you!

title: Comfortable!
text:
I have long, fine hair and I wear it up a lot. A lot of clips are too big for my fine hair. But these clips seem versatile to work for both thick hair (because they open wide) and fine hair like mine. They are very comfortable, don’t pull my hair, and they hold very well. Although they are hard plastic, the tips are not scratchy or sharp, and the material is more like a rubber-coated plastic. The color assortment is very good to go with pretty much any color of clothes or hair. I like them!

I write honest reviews to help others make informed purchases because I read reviews myself and appreciate how helpful they can be. I hope that my review helped you.

title: A bargain for basic eyebrow brushes!
text:
These brushes are great for a more finished look to your eyebrows. I needed a new one—this package of 8 was an unbelievably low price averaging 87 cents each ($6.99 total for 8 brushes)—so now I have a lot of extras! I wanted a short handled eyebrows brush to fit in my makeup bag—these are only 4 1/4 inches from end to end—long enough to handle comfortably, and short enough to fit. They are exactly what I wanted, and great for travel. They are not the highest quality brushes—one brush has a single bristle out of place, and another has a couple of plastic comb prongs not quite straight—but the price was a bargain, and I have plenty in the pack that are just fine (and the slight issues I mentioned don’t make a difference to that one brush). All in all, I am very happy with this purchase.

I write honest reviews to help others make informed purchases. I do that because I read reviews myself and appreciate how helpful they can be. I hope my review helped you.

title: Better quality and more pure smelling than another one I have
text:
I carefully compared this eucalyptus oil to one I already had, and I was surprised to notice a clear difference—this one smells better. I don’t really like the smell of eucalyptus—it’s great for cold relief and in cough drops to help clear your nasal passages, but not just to smell. But this one DOES clearly smell more pure than the one I already had. The other one I was comparing it to is only a couple of months old—so age is not the difference. This does seem to be better quality. I am honestly surprised to be reporting that, because I just didn’t think I would notice a difference.

If my review was helpful, please let Amazon know by clicking “helpful”. Thanks.

title: A staple in wigs
text: I have natural hair. I like to put my hair in protective hairstyles then throw a wig on. I also have a big forehead so I like bangs. Plus summer time is hot, so I don't need a bunch of hair. I love how the top part is natural and show a scalp. Of course you can also adjust it to fit your head. it's comfortable and fit snuggly.

title: Great curl pattern 😊
text: This wig is awesome. I love the curl pattern. I'm not a fan of the bang since I like my bangs to be full and this is not it. Otherwise great wig.

title: Cool product but...
text: I wear a lot of wigs. I also used glue a lot. It messed up my edges. I'm happy that this product allow me to wear wig without glue. The fit is snug,I felt like I was sweating under it lol. But I guess it wasn't snug enough, I could pull and lift my wig out easily. I wish the wig would get stuck to it or something but unfortunately that wasn't the case.

title: COOPER RED WITH VERY LITTLE ORANGE STRANDS
text: First of all I have a problem with the description of the hair.  It says hair for White Women...This is not the case. Women of color can wear this hair as well just like I have done. Beautiful line  of hair. It's a blend of red with orange streaks.  The combo blends very well with my complexion. The hair has body and volume. I did cut the hair to make it look more realistic.

title: BEAUTIFUL ORANGE/GINGER COLORED HAIR
text: This hair is amazing and super long.  I cut mine. The hair is soft, it has body, layered and it is NOT SHINY like most synthetic hair.  This is my second wig from this company and I will definitely purchase more👍☺👏

title: LOOKING FOR A STRAWBERRY BLONDE UNIT THIS IS FOR YOU
text:
I finally found a blonde that matches my skin tone perfectly. Most were too light colored (Platinum Blonde). However, it is NOT the same blonde that is in the photo. The color is more of a Strawberry Blonde it has a reddish tint more than the platinum Ice or White blonde that you see in the photo. However this Company "Alice" has that Ice blonde or White blonde you will have to do a search, it costs around $40. I do recommend it and will most definitely purchase it again. The hair is super soft and it does tangle which is why I took one star off of the rating. This synthetic unit is very similar to human hair. I used a straightening brush for a smoother finish because I cut the hair.
UPDATE: I have been wearing this Wig for 4 weeks now and it's still holding up just fine. This is Unbelievable considering the price and it being synthetic hair😉👍 After washing this wig goes right back to it's original texture, but you may want to use a straightening brush after the wig is fully dry. Btw I did allow it to air dry. I do not use a blow dryer on my Units because they last a lot longer by allowing them to air dry naturally☺👍
Good Luck Ladies...

title: LOOKS AND FEELS NATURAL
text: I finally found a color that blends right with my skin tone. The hair is soft, it has volume and feels and looks natural. This being my first lace wig I am extremely satisfied. I purchased the brown color.  This is my first wig that I bought from Amazon and I love this line of hair.  I most definitely will be purchasing more from this company.  I am loving "ALICE"

title: Smells like REAL fresh cut LEMONS
text:
Update Aug 11, 2021 - After using several wipes I find it's not a fluke.
They leave my hands feeling tacky even after they're dry.
And sweaty hands revive the tackiness.
> This has caused me to remove a star.

Original comments
