title: I❤️the cooling tip on this device👍⭐️
text:
This device comes in a very nice case for storage. The protective glasses 👓 even come in a very nice case. The directions are quite detailed so there is no need for me to discuss that in this review. If you purchase this device you’ll see.

Operating an IPL device is pretty simple if you follow the directions. It’s choosing the level, making sure you don’t miss a spot and having the patience/commitment to follow through with it to get the results you want.

I have seen reviews under many IPL hair removal devices that says they used it for a month and they didn’t see any results. Well, it does take time. Like I said, if you are committed, patience and consistent, then any IPL device will work. This particular device recommends using ONCE a week for 12 weeks, and then once a month there after for maintenance. Most people want to see results by snapping their fingers, and that just isn’t going to happen, even if you do go to a professional, and have it done, it takes time. My advice, if you are not in the mood to take the time, don’t have the patience and or not going to be committed, then don’t get one of these devices because you would be wasting your money.

It took about 4 weeks or 4 treatments before I really started to notice results. First noticed the hair on the underarms because it had become finer, thinner, softer hair that was growing. My bikini 👙 area had spots that the hair didn’t grow back but other spots where it was finer, thinner & softer hair. Even though I had spots with NO HAIR growing back, I still go over all the areas regardless. My left armpit has no hair growing at this time, but I still do a treatment. Once I get to the proper weeks since I first started the treatments, then and only then I will 🛑 treating areas where no hair grows.

My legs 🦵🏼 have been frustrating but it’s definitely working. The problem is that I miss areas each time I do a treatment. There’s no way of getting the entire leg each time. I have come up with a pattern I do that helps me the best. I start at my ankle and go around my leg 🦵🏼 in a circle ⭕️ while spiraling 🌀 up my leg. I found that going up and down is when I was missing the most. Doing a spiral has helped me tremendously.

On the days I am scheduled to do another treatment, I shave 🪒 the areas that I’m going to treat. I also exfoliate the areas using [[ASIN:B099HDG45M Revealer Skin Exfoliator]]. Then about an half hour after I shave 🪒, I start me treatments. KEEP YOUR LEGS DRY, CLEAN AND NO LOTIONS/OILS ETC. NOTHING.
ALWAYS WEAR THE PROTECTIVE 👓 GLASSES!
Since I shave my underarms first, I start there. Underarms takes about 2 minutes each. Then I do my bikini 👙 area and then onto my legs. If I think I forgot a spot I do go back and do it, but I really try to pay attention so I don’t. Once complete I either apply [[ASIN:B0B1N8Z7BR Reviver Skin Soothing Gel]] or [[ASIN:B073WVKRBN USDA Certified Jojoba Oil]]. Both are soothing, but sometimes I feel I need a decent moisturizer and Jojoba Oil is my go to for that.

Well, that’s how I do each treatment. I also put in my schedule/calendar📅 when I’m supposed to do my next treatment. It is time consuming, but the results are so worth it. Think off all the money you are going to save by NOT having to buy EXPENSIVE RAZORS 🪒 anymore. Not to mention the time saved in the shower 🚿.

HOPE THIS HELPS others understand a little of how it works. 👍I feel very comfortable using this device and knew going into it, this is a commitment and requires patience.

title: Nice Facial Cleaning Brush Offers Four Diverse Brush Heads but Only One Speed Option
text:
I'm very interested in trying new beauty products to pamper myself, and I have some dry skin on my face that I'm always struggling to keep in check, so it sounded appealing to give this waterproof facial brush cleaning system a try to compare and contrast to other similar products I own.

This skin cleansing kit comes with one waterproof and cordless rotating machine, one facial brush, one large body brush, one serum and moisturizer applicator sponge, and one pumice stone. This machine requires four AA batteries to run, which aren't included.

The brushes feel pleasant to the touch, and I liked that four different attachment heads were included. They are soft, but have just enough pressure to them to feel like they will exfoliate dirt, oil, and dead skin well. The set-up for this cleaning system is simple and straightforward, but I found it quite difficult to open the battery compartment on the end of the handle.

Once the batteries were inserted successfully and the battery compartment was snapped back into place, all that I needed to do was to pick a brush head and push it in to the attachment point. Then you can turn the unit on or off by pressing one of two buttons on the blue section of the brush. In my experience with the brushes, they didn't rotate evenly, and the brushes wobbled as they rotated. I'm not sure if this is an intended feature or not, but I'm suspecting it simply means the platforms for the brushes aren't quite even.

I'm glad that this cleaning system is waterproof, but I'll admit I was a bit underwhelmed that it only has one speed, and that that speed is rather slow. I still feel like I will get some good use out of it, but I would have liked if there were more speed options, because for attachments like the pumice stone, you really need a slightly faster speed for it to perform really well.

That said, I was generally pleased with the accessories offered in the kit, but would have liked if they included a small storage or travel bag of some kind.

Overall, I like this waterproof electric facial brush, and would recommend it if you're considering adding one to your own health and beauty routine. Just keep in mind it has only one slow speed, and that you will need to provide your own storage bag and batteries.

I am a longtime Amazon Prime customer who writes reviews in my free time. I was appreciative to be given an opportunity to test and review this waterproof facial brush cleaning brush complimentary for my honest and unbiased review. If you have any questions or comments about this product or my review, feel free to message me and I'll be glad to help!

title: Fun Set of Six Large Dreamcatcher Temporary Tattoos
text:
I absolutely love the freedom and possibilities of wearing different temporary tattoos, and I was really excited to discover this diverse set of colorful dreamcatcher designs ranging from tribal, dragons, feathered, nature designs, butterflies, and more.

This particular set of temporary tattoos includes six rather large tattoos that are all individually packaged. They are 5.8 x 8.2 inches in size. This kit did not include any instructions (which I would recommend the manufacturer consider adding), but I peeled off the protective plastic, placed them on my skin, and then wet them with a paper towel for about a minute to transfer them to my skin without any issues. The designs are quite intricate and colorful and I think they would look wonderful on any skin tone.

As a word of advice: remember to have your skin in a somewhat neutral position when you're applying the tattoo so that it doesn't crack or wrinkle after being applied. I didn't experience any irritation or issues when applying it and to do so only required water and a dampened paper towel. Some of the ones I have from other sets have lasted easily longer than a week, and to remove them, you simply rub them with baby oil and a cotton ball. It takes only a bit of rubbing to loosen it up and get it off.

I'm very pleased with the results so far and I am looking forward to using more of them when the time is right. Since they are so huge, I see myself spacing them out a bit. I would definitely recommend them to anyone interested in trying a great six-piece set of colorful dreamcatcher temporary tattoos, just keep in mind that no instructions are included and the product page's text could use some polish and a grammar check.

text:

Everything about this lipstick, except for the modern wearability, is vintage glamour. The shape of the tube and the shape of the lipstick itself harkens to another era. Perfect for making the ultimate Cupid's bow pout. It even has that slight fragrance that will remind you of vintage lipsticks.

I normally wear red that has a little more blue in it, so was surprised that this clear red was fine for me. To me that says that it will flatter a wide range of skin tones.
After swiping it on my wrist and then wiping it away, it left a nice stain. If you aren't interested in that drop dead gorgeous look and want something a little more subtle, it does double duty by leaving a pinky red stain when blotted. But go for the high voltage dramatic red if you want to be noticed.

Very comfortable lipstick, but I didn't have a problem with it bleeding. Non-drying and non-cracking. Opaque coverage with one swipe.

title: 100% Pure Squalane
text:
You can pay a pretty penny for a skin care product that has a percentage of squalane in it, but this is 100% squalane.
I really like that this is plant based, as opposed to being derived from sharks, after all the result is the same.
A few drops and parched skin is instantly soft with just a touch of glow. Or you can mix it with any other skincare product or even a foundation, in order to make it more hydrating.
No fragrance whatsoever, so scent sensitive people will love this.
Another thing to appreciate is that the bottle and dropper are both glass.

Bottom line:
On its own or as an additive in a DIY creation, this may be clear, but it's liquid gold.

title: Good for Mature Skin
text:
Although I'm not thrilled that this didn't have a safety seal on it, the cream itself is very good. It's a heavy cream, despite the company identifying it as being light and whipped. It looks whipped in the jar, but it is not light on the face. I don't think it would be suitable for all ages. Because of the heaviness and intense moisturizing, I believe that mature skin is going to benefit most from using this.
For reference, I'm in my early 60s, in a dry climate, with combination skin (T Zone) and some wrinkles as a point of concern.
This cream works very well with all of the above. I don't put it on my nose, of course, but when I feel like a splurge I put it on my hands because it's so moisturizing.
The claim that it moisturizes 24/7 is indeed true. Even in this dry area, my face feels hydrated all day when I use this cream.
It contains milk protein, yogurt extract, blueberry extract, rice protein, and a host of other skin-loving ingredients.

I hope this review has helped you to make a decision about whether or not you'd like to invest in this product. It is indeed generously sized at 3.4 oz, and it has a very high quality ingredients. But like I said, it's not going to be for everyone.

xxoo

title: Like a Peach Bellini for your Face!
text:
Do you like champagne cocktails? This one smells like a combination of peach and champagne, and even looks like it!
It comes out like a gel. It's activated by water, so after washing your face, leave your face damp and put a thin layer of the gel quickly all over your face. Include your neck if you like.
Then with each passing moment, it's going to get foamier and foamier. That's why you have to have a very thin coat. You only need a small amount of product. If you use too much, your face is going to foam up like you have shaving cream all over!

After about 5 or 10 minutes, you massage a little bit with warm water and then rinse. After you dry your face it's going to feel squeaky clean. If you have dry skin, you're ready for a moisturizing serum and cream. If you have oily or acne prone skin, use the appropriate products for that skin type. I don't feel that this mask is drying, but it does leave you very clean.

So, in my opinion, this is good for all skin types, as long as you use it as a brightening mask as opposed to a hydrating mask.
This is just what your skin needs if you have overdosed on hot humid weather.please look at the ingredients to see if you have any sort of allergy or if any of them are a trigger for any skin issues. Because I have sensitive skin that can be triggered, but I only left it on for about 4 minutes. I had absolutely no irritation, but I think if I had left it on longer, I might have. That doesn't mean it's bad for you. If you leave a mild castile soap, which is so gentle, on your face for any length of time, skin will be irritated.
Made in the USA, from Tonica Skin in Marblehead Massachusetts.

I hope this review has helped you to make a decision about whether or not you'd like to try this fun mask. It really does leave your skin feeling and looking energized, but it's a bit of an investment. Nice splurge for a spa night, and because the product comes out via a pump, it's going to be sanitary for all the participants.
It's going to make for some really fun and Instagram worthy photos!

xxoo

title: Why this is a good value...
text:
This is pure genius.
After unscrewing the top of the cap, you'll see the film that protects the batteries. After you remove it, put the top back on and separate the light unit from the jar.
The red LED light will be activated by pressing against your skin. Does that light actually do anything, or is it a gimmick?
There are a number of high-priced red light units on the market. They were first used in dermatologist offices and med spas. When they first came out, I had a red Tanda unit. This is exactly the same concept, and yes, you will have a slight difference.
The amount of cream gone in the jar has been for about 10 applications. I do it at night so I can relax while holding the unit at various places on my face. The red light goes on when you press slightly on the metal ring, as you can see in the photographs. As you press it to the area of your face that you want treated, slide it from the middle of your face outward, for 3 minutes. Then go to the next area. This way you get a little bit of a lymphatic massage. If you suffer with sinus headaches, this action is very good at offering some relief.
The cream is very lightly fragranced with a fresh scent. It's a gel or mousse type of cream.
After purchasing this, you can get the cream refill.

So much cheaper than buying an LED light device like a Tanda.

title: Similar Masks, but ALL are Delightful
text:

title: Natural plant oils mixed with avocado oil
text:
I wanted this oil because it's a blend that contains both lavender and patchouli. I absolutely adore patchouli, although some products that contain it don't have that wonderful incense sent.
This blend is delightful. You get the patchouli and spicy lavender mixed with a little bit of citrus as well as yang yang. There is even a touch of nutmeg to add even more warm spice.
I also love the elegant dropper, so much nicer than a rubber dropper. The gold top has a button that depresses to dispense a drop at a time.
A very special oil. You don't need a carrier because it's already in skin-loving avocado oil.
It has a shrink wrap to protect against contamination, as well as to assure that you've gotten a brand new product. Very important to me.
Oils can go rancid quickly, and this manufacturer puts an expiration date on the bottom. Any product that can go rancid should have that, but not all do, so that's another great thing about this oil.

title: Damaged or do it yourself? Is it cruelty free....
text:
Feathers can be a little controversial. Rest assured that these are cruelty free! I used to have a peacock as a pet. He shed those beautiful tail feathers every year, and even though he is long gone I still have some of his gorgeous plumes. Peacock feathers are not harvested from the animal, you simply pick them up as they are naturally shed.
This set arrived in a plastic bag. When I pulled the pieces out, there were three peacock feather pieces and one headband. Each feather piece has a rhinestone accent at the bottom. One is all rhinestone, one is a pearl surrounded by rhinestones, and one is a London blue stone surrounded by rhinestones.
Of the two larger pieces, one has an alligator clip hot glued onto the felt backing, and one has a strip of grossgrain ribbon glued to the back. Although I'm not sure, I suspect that it was at one time glued to the headband, or they leave it to the consumer to glue it to the headband. I tried to push the end of the headband through the middle of the ribbon, thinking that perhaps it could slide on, but it is glued completely, you can't slide it onto the headband.
The smaller piece also has an alligator type clip of the same size as the larger clipped piece. They stay beautifully in your hair and are actually comfortable.

I wouldn't call this a glamor or fashion accessory set, it's definitely a costume set that would be great for a roaring twenties party. Each one would also be a fun addition to a hat. I wear a lot of hats and love to adorn them with scarves and feathers.

The following is not part of my review but it is a kind of funny peacock story. naturally, when guests came over they wanted to see him with his tail spread out in beautiful peacock glory. They only open up like that when they're trying to impress someone, and he certainly was never impressed by any of my guests. At the time I also had a miniature pig. That peacock was so in love with the pig that whenever she came near him he would spread out his feathers and shake them hoping she would notice and return his love. Of course that never happened, the pig could care less. But whenever we wanted to show him off to our friends, we would walk the pig over to him and he would immediately open his tail feathers with a great flourish! My friends and I were all impressed. Maggie the pig was not.

title: Fragrance on the Go

title: Something doesn't have to be expensive in order to be effective
text:
I'm in my early 60s, with slight rosacea under my eyes and a couple of red spidery veins around my nose. My spouse is on blood thinners, and bruises easily.
The small amount I show on my hand is the amount I need for my rosacea and around my nose. Not very much at all. It did not happen overnight but it did calm the rosacea down, and while they have not all disappeared, the tiniest of the tiny red lines are gone. Gone!
This cream has also helped those pesky bruises disappear more quickly.

The product contains all of the wonderful herbal and botanical ingredients well-known for healing skin, such as arnica Montana flower, green tea, and chamomile extracts.
The flip cap opens easily, just in case you have any hand difficulties and are curious about that. You need to unscrew the flip cap and remove the safety seal, then screw the cap back on. I can't say this enough, I love a product with a safety seal!

title: Meh, there’s better options
text:
I am very unimpressed with this jade roller. Upon ordering I thought this would be a lovely addition to my skin care routines. I thought I could use it for depuffing, to help increase product absorption or simply to apply a little massage oil before using my myofascial tools. I’m not even entire sure I can utilize this..

First the roller part detaches from the lid easily. On unboxing and just checking out the tool I placed the cap back on the tool and then when i went to remove it for first use the roller ball came right off the top. It took me about 15 minutes to be able to twist lock the rolled ball back to the lid. (First photo) Once I got the roller ball re attached and tried to place ice in the main compartment I found you cant get regular shaped ice in. Only broken ice will fit into the packaging. Secondly, the first time I place ice in it the roller was not cold at all what so ever. I actually had to place ice, let it melt and then place a second round of fresh ice in it for the roller ball to actually get cold. Thirdly, it has no fluid control at all what so ever. So when using this with ice or if the ice melts at all it will just profusely leak water all over where ever you’re applying it. So that rules out me being able to use this with massage oil.

I do like the size of the jade roller and I feel like the concept is there it just needs better packaging. I can’t say I would recommend this because it feels cheap. There’s better jade roller options on the market that would provide better consistency with use, effectiveness and results.

title: Superb Bakuchiol cream
text:
This is a lovely Bakuchiol cream. Bakuchiol is a fantastic natural alternative to retinol. It’s safe for sensitive skin and pregnant women! It’s not photosensitive (unlike retinol) so it can be used both am and pm. The packaging of this product feels simple yet luxurious. The glass jar packaging reminds me a lot of herbivore products.

This cream is lovely to use. It is a thicker heavier cream so, it does take a little longer to absorb. It’s non greasy and although it is a thick cream it does feel light weight once applied. As the cream absorbs it does give a nice radiant dewy glow to my skin tone. I can easily see how this cream would help with anti aging and fine lines with repeated daily use. I’ve been using this cream for about almost a week now and I love seeing my skin so well nourished and hydrated.

The ingredients in the cream are delightful. There is one ingredient that I always acknowledge. This cream does use a silicone ingredient polysilicone-34. I honestly don’t know much about this silicone ingredient and it might be the first product I have used that includes this particular silicone. This cream is gentle and effective even for sensitive skin but I do always acknowledge silicones in the ingredient list. In the week I have used this cream I have not noticed any close comedones, millia or any other adverse side effects from adding this cream to my skin care routines.

I love how deeply nourishing, refreshed and hydrating this cream is for my skin. Even though it takes a while to absorb when I use this cream in the mornings its still easy to apply my make up once this cream does absorb. I don’t wear foundation most days but occasionally I do wear a finishing powder to even out my skin tone if need or to help blend out my highlighter or blush. This cream doesn't sit heavy on my skin or interfere with my make up application or longevity.

I am very happy with this cream and would absolutely recommend it to those who have sensitive skin (as long as you tolerate silicone okay), or to those who prefer a retinol alternative that can still yield good results.

title: Surprisingly fantastic foot cream
text:

So I have spent countless amount of time being bare foot, in and our of pools, and loving feeling the ground on the soles of my feet. I live in a warm climate for most of the year so I wear flip flops for 75% of the year. And my feet reflect that. It’s easy to see how dry my feet are. I have tried a foot mask treatment from this company that did not help with my callouses BUT, this cream is incredible. It immediately softened my two callouses. This cream doesn’t have a scent and it has phenomenal ingredients.

Upon first use my feet feel and look instantly and deeply moisturized. I must admit I rarely moisturize my feet. I have hard floors so, I usually don’t consider moisturizing my feet because I don’t want to slip. This is a heavy cream. You really don’t need much to coat both of your feet. For me, a dime size for each foot or quarter size for both feet works perfectly. I’m actually shocked how moisturizing this feels on my usually tough feet. You can really feel the coconut oil in this product. It feels like a really rich and intensely moisturizing cream. I would highly recommend this to any one who loves to be bare foot or spends lots of time bare foot or in flip flops. ☀️🩴

title: UPDATE!  Contains MMA.
text:
UPDATE!

I’m so positive this mon9mer contains MMA which has been banned on the US because it it so toxic. I came to this conclusion when I tried to remove the nails. Non MMA monomer nails come off easily after soaking in acetone. You need to file the surface, then soak them for 10-20 minutes. You then scrape it off and it comes off in flakes and bits and pieces. You may need to do this more than once. With MMA, you use the same process, but once you start scraping it is a sticky, messy process and as soon as the nail is out of the acetone, it immediately starts to solidify so you really have to do it over and over again, or do the scraping while the nails are in the acetone.

This monomer works well, doesn’t cause my white to yellow at all, but it reeks! Just opening the box I was overwhelmed by the smell. It only got worse once I opened it. After using it for a while I went nose blind, which happens with all sorts of smells, but when my husband got home from work he told me to go outside to use it, lol!

title: They’re fun and messy and I love them!
text:
[[VIDEOID:e86d1c07078a7c725dfea6e4749c9ef3]] These masks are fun and messy and I love them!

You get a small packet of powder and a large packet of gel for each mask. It would be easy to split them in half before mixing and get eight masks out of this instead of four. You could also apply it to your face and neck and still have enough!

I stirred it thoroughly with the wooden spreader included, and it got more and more gummy as I stirred. I chose to apply it with a silicone spatula tool I have for the purpose and it was…messy! If you put it on too early or too thickly all in one go, it drips down your face and looks like your skin is melting (according to my spouse.) You can apply it in thinner layers, but you don’t want to go too slowly either because it’ll turn gummy and unspreadable. I found this to be entertaining rather than problematic. I accidentally got it on my lips so I just went with it and sealed my mouth shut. Blessed silence for half an hour!

After peeling it off (which was also totally fun and kind of gross) my skin felt softer than before I used it and I’d thoroughly enjoyed 45 minutes of my life. YES! I’m a believer!

Next time I’ll use half a mask at a time, but this was a great experience!!

title: Not moisturizing.
text:
[[VIDEOID:4eaf048eb55433860172118977ad0ff1]] I’ve used the entire box, exactly as directed and cannot recommend this product.

The only things I liked about this product is that it’s unscented and the packaging is kind of fun, but that is absolutely outweighed by the possibility cutting yourself.

It does not do what it says. It doesn’t provide “intensive plumping” or”improve skin elasticity” which are just ridiculous claims, particularly when you consider this used for one week and the first two ingredients are water and glycerine. I have pure glycerine and after mixing it with water in various percentages, I’d be comfortable betting that this product is at least 70% water.

I was able to cleanly snap all seven ampoules using the plastic topper provided. Even though my snaps were clean the edges of both pieces are sharp and you shouldn’t touch them. It took me several tries to figure out how to get all the serum out of the ampoules. For three days I was tapping the opening on my palm which didn’t feel great, but I just couldn’t get it to pour out cleanly.

Although it is almost as liquid as water, if you get the opening of the ampoules covered with the liquid it won’t come out because of surface tension. If this happens just turn the bottle open side up and blow on the liquid until the opening is clear and you’re good to go.

If you can tilt the bottle just right you can get the serum to pour out. It’s tricky, but spend the time doing it that way and you’ll save yourself a lot of frustration. You see me getting it right in the video, but even then I had to blow the ampoule open once.

There is also the cost. $50.00 for one week of use. That’s about $200 a month and $1250 a year although it does specify that you should use this daily for six weeks, maximum. Why? Is that concerning to anyone else? Anyway, even if you have money to burn you would do well spending it on a procedure from a dermatologist or a flight to Dubai for vacation. This is absolutely ridiculous.

This serum is really refreshing and I use it every night on my face and neck. You can use it morning and night, but I just chose to apply it before bed. I pour about a third of a dropper full into my hand and rub it in gently. I have severely dry skin and it has helped keep the dryness and flakes at bay, which is wonderful. But, with that being said, this brand is also cheaper in price. I am happy with it and will continue using it. I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.  All comments and opinions expressed herein are 100% my own and are not influenced whatsoever by my discounted purchase price.

title: Works for some mini polishes, too
text:
I received this product discounted in exchange for a review--I state this disclaimer upfront because that's what I would want to know first, and I too am disturbed by the ratings inflation on Amazon for IEF reviews lately. I do not indiscriminately give 5star reviews, and they are only given for a fraction of products I try that I find are exceptional and I would buy myself at FULL price. If you wish not to view IEF reviews such as this, click on the filter link to the right of the review section, and then click on "verified purchases only"; that will take most of them out.

Well, I'm overall pretty pleased with this product. I got it hoping I could use it to organize some of my nail polish minis, and it does hold much of my collection. The mini OPI bottles for the most part fit in the lipstick columns, though not all the way in, for some (strangely enough, the Nordic Collection ones are just a smidge smaller and go in smoothly, despite supposedly being the same exact size). That was the main purpose of me getting this, so I'm pleased. I know it was made for other types of makeup, but I already have a system for them; it was all my loose polishes that were driving me nuts. Please note that you won't get many full-size polishes to fit, though the Essie square type bottles make it easier to get as many in as possible. As you can see, I had to put some big bottles upside-down to fit more in. It still had room for my nail brushes, file, foils, tapes, glitters, and cotton balls in the bottom. The material is a very clear acrylic, but it doesn't feel too cheap. One complaint I have is the drawers can get a little stuck; but this is common with these acrylic drawers. Also, the top pc is separate from the bottom drawers, which I don't like. But these are all minor complaints. Overall, pleased it does the job.

title: Not 100% Agran Oil, OK for Hair Use, maybe not skin or face
text:
This is no criticism of the distributor of this product, they do tell you the ingredients on the selling page: Cyclopentasiloxane, Dimethicone, Cyclomethicone, Butylphenyl Methylpropional, Argania Spinoza, Kernel Oil(Argan Oil), Linum Usitatissimum (linseed) Extract, Parfum (Fragrance). However, you expect this product to be mostly argan oil, and I don't think it is. First, 100% argan oil usually has a very earthy scent. This product is heavily perfumed. And, if you're trying to reduce the 'cones in your hair styling or skin routine, you can clearly see that Dimethicone and Cyclomethicone are one of the first ingredients, before argan oil.

I did use it on my hair after shampooing and conditioning. I'm not a "no-poo" person, so I don't mind using this for my hair. It did make my hair smooth and shiny with blow-drying. However, there is a lot of fragrance in this product, which stayed with me and on my pillowcase for quite a while. There is also a coating to my hair, unlike pure argan oil which usually sinks in my hair. Some people like that coated feeling on their hair, but I only use those types of products on days where I'll be prone to frizzies.

This product is just OK for me. I would use caution using it on the skin because there is a lot of perfume and additives, so spot check first. I'll just be using it for my hair.

title: Very cute hair ties/pins, good for home or gift
text: This is an adorable set of hair ties, all very cute.  I thought that they would be cheap and flimsy, but the ties and pins are fairly good quality.  The ties do not tangle in the hair.  The pins don't hold hair that well, but can easily keep hair out of eyes.  The box is very useful for keeping the pins/ties organized.  You can take out the dividers between the boxes to make larger areas.  The box makes it very gift-worthy as well.  My two girls have had a blast using this set, recommend!

title: Perfect! I bought 2!
text:
I love this wig!! I actually took the braids out and it looks great!
I have black hair, you cant even tell =P
I do have a really low hairline along the nape of my neck, so I did have to buy some additional wig clips to sew one in at the nape to hopefully secure it a little better and hide my annoying hairline, otherwise its just perfect!
Its not overly shiny at all, looks super realistic!
I bought 2 for cosplay purposes, I do intend to get at least one more =)

title: Bold and beautiful
text: These lashes were definitely on the dramatic side but they were also very good quality.  If you are doing a look for a show or looking for a bold look, these lashes are perfect!

title: Lucious lashes
text: Happy to add these lashes to my collection. They are very dramatic so for a more natural look you may have to trim them. But they are perfect for going out and full makeup glam.

title: Variety pack - Must buy!!
text: These were definitely worth the buy! These lashes are great quality and come with a variety for whichever look you are going for. In this picture I am wearing the longest lashes in the pack. They were very easy to apply I would definitely get them again!!

title: Stunning!
text: Newcally lashes are so perfect for every look! These lashes are lightweight and were easy to apply. They are pretty wide so for girls who have smaller eyes you may have to adjust them but other than that they are so pretty!! They are also able to be worn multiple times.

title: Glamorous!!
text: These lashes are amazing. Very glamorous and reusable. I’ve used them twice now with no problems. They are super pretty and great for a bold look!

title: Wow, I am impressed!
text: I have a bigger version of this tool for the body that is also silver/chrome but it is not well made and looks shoddy compared to this because it is probably not metal and made of plastic.  I didn't have any expectations for this but was so pleasantly surprised by how nice it is.  It looks very fancy and feels really good in my hand and on my face.  It's easy to roll around on my face and jawline without having to put face oil.  I have Gua Sha tool with a roller at the end that costs 3x this and they're both in the same caliber imo.  Get this, you will love it! And at this low price of $14, get one for your friend!

title: You get two!
text: The shower caps arrived promptly in a ziplock bag that had been sealed with a sticker. I opened it and what do you know? There are 2! It feels sturdy and is waterproof. I’m able to fit my big noggin and all my hair in this cap no problem.  It fit really well and I wore it over my ears and when I showered, my hair was dry.  Really great shower caps and so much better than those disposable plastic version that won’t sit in place.

title: Perfect wig for Velma
text: I have the brown wig for Velma Scooby Doo costume and it is really cute and looks adorable. I’m quite proud of myself for being so top of it and ready for Halloween. It comes with a pair of glasses (without lenses) and wig caps and some temporary tattoos. Compare to the photos online, I think it’s slightly lighter in color and shinier.

title: Great value
text: These lashes are great for every day use. They are easy to apply. I love how many I’ve gotten for the price I paid. Definitely recommended.

title: Pretty and lots of variety!
text: I love the variety in lashes. They are long but feel light at the same time. They look very expensive. I love these.

title: Buy these!
text: These lashes are easy to put on. They look really good. I will definitely be ordering more. There are four different styles so you can always switch it up.

title: Great stuff
text:
Beautiful stuff - great color, easy to use, and a brilliant chrome finish. The picture doesn't do it justice, but gives an idea of the easy, smooth finish.

Packaging was great, very secure. They even included sample nail vinyls and a thank you note!

title: My new favorite thing!
text:
This is lovely, lovely stuff. Goes on like a dream, beautiful color, and my new favorite thing! The picture doesn't do it justice, but it shows the easy chrome finish.

Packaging was great, very secure. Everything arrived in perfect order. They threw in a few examples of their vinyls, which I'm looking forward to trying. They even included a handwritten thank you card. I'll be ordering from them again.

title: Very disappointing
text:
First, it arrived damaged; one of the powders had opened during transit, and contaminated the others. In fact, all of the powders seem mixed.

The particle size is too large for a true chrome finish. It's grainy and glittery. The colors are OK, not wonderful, but not bad. I was hoping for the chrome finish, so I was very disappointed. After trying one of the more expensive powders, it's much more apparent.

If you're not picky about it, they're still fun, and a decent price point.

title: Voluminous & I love it!
text: [[VIDEOID:9285cd853034c22b95758b6c04ee6502]] FIRST OF ALL!!! CAN I SAY HOW PRETTY THESE LASHES ARE?! The volume is sooo nice >>> a look with just these lashes is so cute or even some eyeshadow. These are going to look so cute on me with my Christmas/New Years outfit! Like YESSS. & for the price & amount of pairs (12), I think it’s sooo affordable

title: Yessssss!!!
text: I loveeee. So there are two types or lash styles. I think the first is a bit more dramatic and the second are a little more natural but with a little volume. I used the second for a job interview (the more natural one) and got lots of compliments on how simple yet cute they were (also in the pic). You’re getting sooooo many for that price so I think it was definitely worth it in my opinion especially if you like a little volume but no SO much like 25mm. Will purchase again

title: Pretty Eyelashes
text: The prettiest eyelashes ever!!! I love them and they’re beautiful! Honestly they feel so light but are so voluminous and don’t feel heavy at all. 10/10 recommend for dramatic looks or a day you just wanna put some on for a cute look. Love these so much!

title: Best 25 mm lashes!!!!
text: [[VIDEOID:d2decebabee80061aaed7a81bec58ee5]] THE EYELASHES ARE BEAUTIFUL!!! I love them soooo much. They are so soft and so worth it. I recommend to anyone who likes REALLY long eyelashes and love dramatic looks

title: Best eyeliner and lashes - easy to stick on & so cute for easy, natural looks
text: These are the best! I was so surprised at the eyeliner! My eyelashes stuck right on! It was better than my eyelash glue & it gave me an edgy look with the liner. It glided on pretty nice & I could use it with any eyelashes. The eyelashes were pretty cute & natural too! Perfect for an everyday look (first picture). The other pictures had eyeliner & eyelashes! I’m so glad I got them.

title: Beautiful
text: This hair piece is gorgeous. Really pretty details between the flowers and rhinestones. Easy to stick into your hair. It’s actually good size too. Larger than expected. The flowers are bendable as well. You can shape them in the direction you prefer. This would be nice for any dressy outfit or occasion. Feels well made and high quality. Haven't had any issues with diamonds or pieces falling out.

title: Pretty
text: I had to trim the bangs to fit my face, which is no big deal. The hair itself is decent quality.  It’s pretty shiny and silky. Doesn’t get tangled. No smell which is awesome!! The color is beautiful! Love the length and the light wave in the hair. Super cute. Overall it fits my head well and was pretty easy to put on.

title: Velvety soft!
text: I Am very impressed with the softness and quality of these brushes. The bristles are super velvety and smooth against your skin. I like the variety of brush styles this pack includes. I like the feel of the handles and the look of them. So far I’ve been happy with the make up application of each brush.

title: Pretty colors.
text: Love playing with different eye shadows and colors. I’m no make up expert but I personally liked this little eye shadow pallet. It has good color options and mixes it up between Matt and glittery options. Goes on pretty well. Can stack and layer depending how dark and dramatic you want your eyes. Can make some really pretty combinations and blends. Excited to keep using this. Now I just need somewhere to get dressed up and go to! Washes off easy.

title: Bright colors and easy to use
text: These are cool for kid play or a fun dress up night. But they aren’t great quality. The hair looks cheap. Each strand is super long!! The pack comes with two of each color. They clip in really easy just like hair pieces. So easy it snapped into my infant daughters hair. I’ll save these in my costume box but don’t plan on wearing these out much.

title: Poor quality hair
text: This wig is okay. Fun for dress up but the hair quality looks cheap. It fits okay but again looks like it starts to frizz at times. The color is a soft pink. Definitely won’t be wearing out. More for a fun dress up party.

title: Beautiful hair!!
text: This wig is beautiful! The hair Itself is gorgeous and looks silky smooth. I also really like the color. It’s a lovely chocolate brown with almost a hint of maroon in it. The curls are soft and flowy, and the hair comes all the way down my back. It’s actually very comfortable to wear too. Comes with a hair net. I literally just threw my real hair in a bun under this wig for the photo and it still fit good. This will be fun for dressing up.

title: Good quality wig.
text: This wig fits nicely and is pretty comfy. Easy to put on and is adjustable inside. It comes packaged nicely within a hair net and cardboard and also comes with a net to wear on your hair under the wig. The hair quality is excellent and looks real. So far it doesn’t look frizzy or course like some wigs do. The hair stays in place pretty nicely.

title: Kind of weird fit
text: Got this wig for dress up occasions or future halloween costumes. It's got a nice color and length to it but the fit is kind of weird. It didn't cover my side hair all the way- but maybe I didn't pull it down enough. I'm not used to wearing wigs. The hair quality itself (like the braid) is decent but the top of the wig is super poofy and looks a little odd. I need to try and mess with it more, maybe hair spray it or something to fix the top.

title: Good selection of colors and comfortable
text: I really like these headbands. The style is cute and they are a thick nylon feel so they are soft on your ears. I like that they are thick in the back which help hold up all of my short hairs. They each come individually wrapped and have a nice selection of colors. I would recommend.
